title: サイボーグではありません

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly realize that Mihono Bourbon is in the
gym, training away in silence.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure she's been at it for almost two
hours now—with no rest.
choice_data_list: Maybe it's time for a break?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your concern. I was lost deep in
thought.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I have a question that requires your input. Do
you find me frightening?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There have been rumors among the academy
students that I may be a cyborg.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm initially surprised by the absurdity of this
rumor, but intrigue makes me want to find out
more.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The rumor took on a life of its own before I could
confirm or deny the claims...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear?! Mihono Bourbon can shoot beams
out of her eyes!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Wait, seriously?! I heard she can also fire rockets
from her mouth!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Rumors spawned more rumors, and soon enough
my image had ballooned into something else
entirely.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
One time, I merely picked up and handed
someone her towel, when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Please, have mercy! Not the beams! Anything but
the beams!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: How others evaluate me is none of my concern.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, I've determined that my frightening
image is a cause for concern, unintentional
though it may be.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
As such, I've been searching for a solution to this
predicament.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If you have any suggestions, I would appreciate
your input.
choice_data_list: Train your facial muscles to be more expressive!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see your point. So I should first work on being
more expressive.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I've received many comments about
my lack of expression.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your valuable insight. I will
commence training my facial muscles at once.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She proceeds to buckle down into training her
facial muscles...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hello, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she has such a lovely smile! Is she really a
cyborg?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
She's not scary at all! Yeah, she's definitely just a
regular Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the misunderstanding has been
cleared up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Inflection... That is, to raise and lower the tone of
my voice. I see your point.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
So the misunderstanding stemmed from my
mechanical-sounding voice. It is a plausible
theory.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Situation confirmed. Inputting tone inflection. I
appreciate your valuable insight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Mihono Bourbon starts to speak
with inflection—in her own unique way. However...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: HeeeLLLoOo EvERyyyOoOooNe!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Is she yodeling or something?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't know... Maybe she's trying out her new
update?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She ends up instilling even more fear amongst the
students.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Commencing new search for solutions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gets tunnel vision searching for a new
solution and is unable to concentrate on training.
